prompt: Draft a detailed wet-lab protocol for expressing and purifying recombinant human VEGF-A165 (vascular endothelial growth factor A, isoform 165) from HEK293F suspension cells for structural studies and antibody generation. The protocol should include: (1) cloning strategy: codon-optimised VEGF-A165 in pcDNA3.4 with C-terminal His6 tag and signal peptide, (2) transient transfection conditions (PEI-MAX, cell density, harvest timing), (3) conditioned medium harvest and His-tag IMAC purification (HisTrap HP), (4) size-exclusion chromatography (Superdex 200) for dimer isolation, (5) quality control: SDS-PAGE, SEC-MALS for MW confirmation, VEGFR-2 binding ELISA as functional test, (6) storage conditions and expected yield. Include troubleshooting guidance for low yield and aggregation issues.
source_citation: Derived from uniprot (2024_05) and recombinant protein production literature; target: VEGF-A165; organism: Homo sapiens; catalogue version v1.0

_provenance.target_class: recombinant human vascular endothelial growth factor
